reviews.comment:
Pasamos de noche, apenas llegamos a cargar nafta, salió el empleado, super atento, pero algo para resaltar son los baños Impecable!!!!

(Translated by Google)
We stopped overnight, and as soon as we got to the gas station, the attendant came out and was super helpful. But what really stands out are the bathrooms—impeccable!

reviews.comment:
No lo detesto. Creo que el aseo de los baños deja mucho que desear. La atención de los empleados de surtidor , EXCELENTE.

I don't hate it. I think the cleanliness of the restrooms leaves a lot to be desired. The service from the gas station employees was EXCELLENT.
